fields.label: Disclaimer
fields.value: Our archive preserves and provides access to historical materials, some of which may contain offensive, biased, or outdated content. We strive to offer historical context by presenting these materials in their original form, using the language and perspectives of the time in which they were created. By sharing them as they originally appeared, we aim to accurately reflect the context of our collections for research and educational purposes. These views do not represent the values or beliefs of our institution.

fields.label: Title
fields.value: Summit Crow Creek Pass, Alaska. One of the passes on my trip to the coast.

fields.label: Description
fields.value: Title from photo caption and from album label.

fields.label: Ordering & Use
fields.value: For information on ordering and using this material: https://library.uaf.edu/aprca/services/reproductions

fields.label: Standard Citation
fields.value: We ask that our material be cited as follows: Collection Name, Identifier, Archives, University of Alaska Fairbanks.

fields.label: Holding Institution
fields.value: Alaska and Polar Regions Collections & Archives, Elmer E. Rasmuson Library, University of Alaska Fairbanks

fields.label: Contact Us
fields.value: The Alaska and Polar Regions Collections & Archives is always interested in making its records better. If you would like to help improve or correct this record, please contact us here: https://library.uaf.edu/aprca
